title: crinum ornatum subvar. acutior
intro: Crinum ornatum subvar. acutior, also known as the 'Golden Lilyturf', is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal uses.
